title: Smoothvanilla Red CPVP
description: This projekt adds a new style of the cpvp items
body:
**A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a smooth red style and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things:**

- respawn anchor
- glowstone
- obsidian
- ender pearl
- golden apple
- animated totem
- low fire
- deepslate
- small shield
- no explosion particles
- better particles
- small totem pop
- old glint
- invis grass & dead bushes
invis ores for clean game
